m	Z	
RFC 6979:
    Deterministic Usage of the Digital Signature Algorithm (DSA) and
    Elliptic Curve Digital Signature Algorithm (ECDSA)
    http://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6979
Many thanks to Coda Hale for his implementation in Go language:
    https://github.com/codahale/rfc6979
hexlify
number_to_string
number_to_string_crop
bit_length)
hmac_compat)
bits2int
bits2octets
generate_kc
intr
len)
data
qlen
1/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/ecdsa/rfc6979.pyr
orderZ
        order - order of the DSA generator used in the signature
        secexp - secure exponent (private key) in numeric form
        hash_func - reference to the same hash function used for generating
            hash
        data - hash in binary form of the signing data
        retry_gen - int - how many good 'k' values to skip before returning
        extra_entropy - extra added data in binary form as per section-3.6 of
            rfc6979
    
Z	digestmodr
digest_sizer
hmac
updateZ
digestr
secexpZ	hash_funcr
Z	retry_genZ
extra_entropyr
holenZ
rolen
secretr
__doc__r
binasciir
utilr
_compatr
__all__r
<module>
